name: Possessed Destiny
desc: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; Special Summon 1 "Charmer" or "Familiar-Possessed" monster with the same Attribute from your hand, Deck, or GY in face-up Attack Position or face-down Defense Position, then you can change that target to face-down Defense Position. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 monster you control; change its battle position. You can only use each effect of "Possessed Destiny" once per turn.
